title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization is the better bet for AI tools over subscriptions and that human trust adoption, not technology, is the current bottleneck for AI agents. He discusses decision-making frameworks from competitive sailing applied to startup building and fundraising.
